title: verify-work-email — input
description: Runner invocation parameters for verify-contacts.mjs. Selects prospects from revops.public.prospects by engagement, then iterates each contact with an email that has not been verified yet.

limit.description: Max prospects to process. 0 or omitted = no limit.

execute.description: PLAN mode if false/absent. EXECUTE mode if true — writes back to DB.

x-source-table.note: OPEN ITEM: stage filter is 'contacted' (slice-2 post-outreach posture). At SOP node n6 (pre-outreach), prospects may be in a different stage. Confirm correct stage value before executing against live CIPO data.

x-contact-shape.description: Each qualifying row in prospects.enrichment.contacts[] where email is non-null and verified_by is absent

verified_by.description: Absent or null = not yet verified. Present = skip.
